faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about services and working together.

whatIsRlhf.question: What is RLHF and why is it important?
whatIsRlhf.answer: RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) is a crucial technique for training AI models to produce more helpful, accurate, and safe outputs. As an RLHF specialist, I provide high-quality human feedback data that helps AI systems better understand user intent and deliver more relevant responses.

turnaround.question: What is the typical turnaround time?
turnaround.answer: Turnaround times vary based on project scope. Standard translation projects typically take 1-3 business days, while larger AI data operations projects are scoped individually. Rush services are available for urgent requests.

industries.question: Which industries do you serve?
industries.answer: I work across technology, AI/ML, legal, financial services, healthcare, and government sectors. My specialization in technical and AI-related content makes me particularly valuable for tech companies and AI research organizations.

confidentiality.question: How do you handle confidential information?
confidentiality.answer: All projects are treated with strict confidentiality. I sign NDAs as standard practice and follow industry-leading security protocols for data handling. Sensitive materials are stored securely and deleted after project completion.

languages.question: Which language combinations do you support?
languages.answer: I specialize in Norwegian, Swedish, Danish, Turkish, and English in various combinations. My native-level proficiency in these languages ensures accuracy and cultural appropriateness in all deliverables.

pricing.question: How is pricing determined?
pricing.answer: Pricing depends on project type, complexity, language combination, and timeline. I offer hourly, project-based, and retainer models. Contact me with your project details for a customized quote.
